name: cm-chessboard
description: A JavaScript chessboard which is lightweight, ES6 module based, responsive, SVG rendered and without dependencies.

scripts.test: tput setaf 4;echo 'Run test/index.html in your browser for unit testing, or `npm run test:headless` (needs a global puppeteer).'; echo ''; exit 0
